name: Chocolate Smunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chocolate pudding according to the package directions, using nonfat milk.
2. Allow the pudding to cool completely.
3. Mix peanut butter with the cooled pudding until well combined.
4. Scoop about 1 tablespoon of the mixture onto one graham cracker square.
5. Spread a small amount (about 1 tablespoon) of low-cal whipped topping over the pudding on the graham cracker.
6. Place another graham cracker square on top and cover.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Each serving contains approximately 200 calories, 1 starch, 1 gram of protein, 17 grams carbohydrate, 8 grams protein, 12 grams fat, and 142 mg sodium.
